news.t: J.P. Morgan to Transfer 14 ETFs From Current Exchanges
J.P. Morgan Asset Management Unveils New JPMorgan Equity and Options ETF (JOYT)

holdings.infoBox: JOYT is an equity ETF with a total of 117 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.46%, Apple at 6.79%, Alphabet at 5.36%, Microsoft at 5.04%, and Amazon.com at 4.09%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Equity and Options Total Return ETF (JOYT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund invests in an actively managed portfolio of large- and mid-cap US equities while employing an options overlay strategy to provide a diversified source of total return and reduced volatility. JOYT was launched on Aug 18, 2025 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
